creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
Peter Pentchev wrote:
> On Thu, Sep 06, 2001 at 04:47:45PM +0200, Cyrille Lefevre wrote:
> 
> > Index: Makefile
> > ===================================================================
> > RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/sysutils/fileutils/Makefile,v
> > retrieving revision 1.5
> > diff -u -r1.5 Makefile
> > --- Makefile	2001/06/16 13:58:38	1.5
> > +++ Makefile	2001/09/06 14:45:53
> [snip]
> > -GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
> > -CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--program-prefix=g
> > +USE_PERL5=	yes
> > +USE_LIBTOOL=	yes
[snip]
> 
> Did you really mean to remove GNU_CONFIGURE=yes?  As explained in my

GNU_CONFIGURE is implied by USE_LIBTOOL.

> followup to another of your PR's, GNU_CONFIGURE already guarantees
> that PREFIX is honored.

see PR #30389 for answers about PREFIX.

Cyrille.
